feat.name: Twirling Strike
feat.text: Your fans, one raised up alongside your head and the other alongside your hip, become a blur as you twirl across the battlefield. Attempt to Tumble Through an enemy’s space using Performance; on a success, you can make a melee Strike against the enemy with a fan you’re wielding at any point during the movement. On a critical success, the enemy is off-guard against this attack.

traits.name: Archetype
traits.text: This feat belongs to an archetype.
